title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 544.046 - Compact — entered into
text:
544.046.  Compact — entered into. — The Nonresident Violator Compact, hereinafter called "the compact," is hereby enacted into law and entered into with all other jurisdictions legally joining therein in the form substantially as follows: 
(L. 1980 H.B. 980 § 1, A.L. 2012 H.B. 1402) 
(1991) Missouri nonresident violator compact does not infringe upon the rights of the national government in violation of art. 1, sec. 10, U.S.C.A. State v. Kurt, 802 S.W.2d 954 (Mo.banc).
